source_query: SELECT T2."Zip" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T1."District Name" = 'Fresno County Office of Education' AND T1."Charter School (Y/N)" = TRUE
SELECT T2."Phone" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" ORDER BY T1."NumGE1500" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2."School") FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."Virtual" = 'F' AND T1."AvgScrMath" > 400
SELECT T2."School" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."Magnet" = TRUE AND T1."NumTstTakr" > 500
SELECT "NumTstTakr" FROM "satscores" WHERE "cds" = ( SELECT "CDSCode" FROM "frpm" ORDER BY "FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1 )
SELECT T2."MailStreet" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" ORDER BY T1."FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

SELECT T2."Phone" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T1."Charter Funding Type" = 'Directly funded' AND T1."Charter School (Y/N)" = TRUE AND T2."OpenDate" > '2000-01-01'
SELECT "Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)" FROM "frpm" WHERE "County Name" = 'Alameda' ORDER BY ("Free Meal Count (K-12)"::DOUBLE PRECISION / "Enrollment (K-12)") DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

SELECT "Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" FROM "frpm" WHERE "Educational Option Type" = 'Continuation School' AND "Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY "Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 3
SELECT T2."CDSCode" FROM "schools" AS T1 INNER JOIN "frpm" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."Enrollment (K-12)" + T2."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 500
SELECT T1."NCESSchool" FROM "schools" AS T1 INNER JOIN "frpm" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" ORDER BY T2."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 5
SELECT T1."Phone" FROM "schools" AS T1 INNER JOIN "satscores" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."cds" ORDER BY T2."NumGE1500"::DOUBLE PRECISION / T2."NumTstTakr" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 3
SELECT COUNT(T1."CDSCode") FROM "schools" AS T1 INNER JOIN "satscores" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."cds" WHERE T1."StatusType" = 'Merged' AND T2."NumTstTakr" < 100 AND T1."County" = 'Lake'

SELECT MAX(T1."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "satscores" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."cds" WHERE T2."NumGE1500"::DOUBLE PRECISION / T2."NumTstTakr" > 0.3

SELECT COUNT(T1."CDSCode") FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "satscores" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."cds" WHERE T1."Charter Funding Type" = 'Directly funded' AND T1."County Name" = 'Fresno' AND T2."NumTstTakr" <= 250
SELECT COUNT("CDSCode") FROM "frpm" WHERE "County Name" = 'Los Angeles' AND "Free Meal Count (K-12)" > 500 AND "FRPM Count (K-12)" < 700
SELECT COUNT(T1."School Name") FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."County" = 'Amador' AND T1."Low Grade" = '9' AND T1."High Grade" = '12'
SELECT "sname" FROM "satscores" WHERE "cname" = 'Contra Costa' AND "sname" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY "NumTstTakr" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

SELECT T1."sname", T2."Charter Funding Type" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "frpm" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."District Name" LIKE 'Riverside%' GROUP BY T1."sname", T2."Charter Funding Type" HAVING SUM(T1."AvgScrMath")::DOUBLE PRECISION / COUNT(T1."cds") > 400

SELECT T1."School Name", T2."Street", T2."City", T2."State", T2."Zip" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."County" = 'Monterey' AND T1."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" > 800 AND T1."School Type" = 'High Schools (Public)'
SELECT T2."OpenDate" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" ORDER BY T1."Enrollment (K-12)" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT T2."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "frpm" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" ORDER BY T1."AvgScrRead" DESC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 1

SELECT T2."School", T2."DOC" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."FundingType" = 'Locally funded' AND (T1."Enrollment (K-12)" - T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > (SELECT AVG(T3."Enrollment (K-12)" - T3."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") FROM "frpm" AS T3 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T4 ON T3."CDSCode" = T4."CDSCode" WHERE T4."FundingType" = 'Locally funded')
SELECT "Free Meal Count (K-12)"::DOUBLE PRECISION / "Enrollment (K-12)" FROM "frpm" ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC NULLS LAST OFFSET 9 LIMIT 2

SELECT T1."FRPM Count (K-12)"::DOUBLE PRECISION / T1."Enrollment (K-12)" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."SOC" = '66' ORDER BY T1."FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 5

SELECT T2."Website", T1."School Name" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T1."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" BETWEEN 1900 AND 2000 AND T2."Website" IS NOT NULL
SELECT T2."City" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" GROUP BY T2."City" ORDER BY SUM(T1."Enrollment (K-12)") ASC NULLS FIRST, T2."City" ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 5
SELECT T2."AdmEmail1" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T1."Charter School (Y/N)" = TRUE ORDER BY T1."Enrollment (K-12)" ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

SELECT T2."AdmFName1", T2."AdmLName1", T2."AdmFName2", T2."AdmLName2", T2."AdmFName3", T2."AdmLName3" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" ORDER BY T1."NumGE1500" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT T2."Website" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T1."NumTstTakr" BETWEEN 2000 AND 3000 AND T2."County" = 'Los Angeles'

SELECT T2."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)"::DOUBLE PRECISION / T2."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" FROM "schools" AS T1 INNER JOIN "frpm" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T1."AdmFName1" = 'Kacey' AND T1."AdmLName1" = 'Gibson'
SELECT AVG(T1."NumTstTakr") FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T2."OpenDate") = 1980 AND T2."County" = 'Fresno'

SELECT T2."Phone" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."District" = 'Fresno Unified' AND T1."AvgScrRead" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1."AvgScrRead" ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT T2."EdOpsName" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" ORDER BY T1."AvgScrMath" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

SELECT "School" FROM (SELECT T2."School", T1."AvgScrRead", RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY T2."County" ORDER BY T1."AvgScrRead" DESC) AS rnk FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."Virtual" = 'F' ) AS ranked_schools WHERE rnk <= 5
SELECT T1."AvgScrWrite", T2."City" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" ORDER BY T1."NumGE1500" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT T2."School", T1."AvgScrWrite" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."AdmFName1" = 'Ricci' AND T2."AdmLName1" = 'Ulrich'
SELECT T2."School" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."DOC" = '31' ORDER BY T1."Enrollment (K-12)" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT("School")::DOUBLE PRECISION / 12 FROM "schools" WHERE "DOC" = '52' AND "County" = 'Alameda' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "OpenDate") = 1980
SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN "DOC" = '54' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))::DOUBLE PRECISION / SUM(CASE WHEN "DOC" = '52' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM "schools" WHERE "StatusType" = 'Merged' AND "County" = 'Orange'
SELECT COUNT(T1."cds") FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."MailCity" = 'Lakeport' AND (T1."AvgScrRead" + T1."AvgScrMath" + T1."AvgScrWrite") >= 1500
SELECT T1."NumTstTakr" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."MailCity" = 'Fresno'
SELECT "School", "MailZip" FROM "schools" WHERE "AdmFName1" = 'Avetik' AND "AdmLName1" = 'Atoian'
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN "County" = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE PRECISION / SUM(CASE WHEN "County" = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM "schools" WHERE "MailState" = 'CA'
SELECT COUNT("CDSCode") FROM "schools" WHERE "City" = 'San Joaquin' AND "MailState" = 'CA' AND "StatusType" = 'Active'
SELECT "Phone", "Ext", "School" FROM "schools" WHERE "Zip" = '95203-3704'
SELECT "Website" FROM "schools" WHERE ("AdmFName1" = 'Mike' AND "AdmLName1" = 'Larson') OR ("AdmFName1" = 'Dante' AND "AdmLName1" = 'Alvarez')
SELECT "Website" FROM "schools" WHERE "County" = 'San Joaquin' AND "Virtual" = 'P' AND "Charter" = TRUE
SELECT COUNT("School") FROM "schools" WHERE "DOC" = '52' AND "Charter" = TRUE AND "City" = 'Hickman'

SELECT COUNT(T2."School") FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."County" = 'Los Angeles' AND T2."Charter" = FALSE AND T1."Free Meal Count (K-12)"::DOUBLE PRECISION * 100 / T1."Enrollment (K-12)" < 0.18;
SELECT "AdmFName1", "AdmLName1", "School", "City" FROM "schools" WHERE "Charter" = TRUE AND "CharterNum" = '00D2'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "schools" WHERE "CharterNum" = '00D4' AND "MailCity" = 'Hickman'

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN "FundingType" = 'Locally funded' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DOUBLE PRECISION * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN "FundingType" != 'Locally funded' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM "schools" WHERE "County" = 'Santa Clara' AND "Charter" = TRUE
SELECT COUNT("School") FROM "schools" WHERE TO_CHAR("OpenDate", 'YYYY') BETWEEN '2000' AND '2005' AND "County" = 'Stanislaus' AND "FundingType" = 'Directly funded'
SELECT COUNT("School") FROM "schools" WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "ClosedDate") = 1989 AND "City" = 'San Francisco' AND "DOCType" = 'Community College District'
SELECT "NCESDist" FROM "schools" WHERE "SOC" = '31'
SELECT COUNT("School") FROM "schools" WHERE ("StatusType" = 'Closed' OR "StatusType" = 'Active') AND "SOC" = '69' AND "County" = 'Alpine'
SELECT T1."District Code" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."City" = 'Fresno' AND T2."Magnet" = FALSE
SELECT MIN(T1."Low Grade") FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."NCESDist" = '0613360' AND T2."EdOpsCode" = 'SPECON'

SELECT T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."EdOpsCode" = 'SSS' AND T2."City" = 'Fremont' AND LEFT(T1."Academic Year", 4)::INTEGER BETWEEN 2014 AND 2015
SELECT T2."EILName", T2."School" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T1."NSLP Provision Status" = 'Breakfast Provision 2' AND T1."County Code" = '37'

SELECT T2."City" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T1."NSLP Provision Status" = 'Lunch Provision 2' AND T2."County" = 'Merced' AND T1."Low Grade" = '9' AND T1."High Grade" = '12' AND T2."EILCode" = 'HS'

SELECT "T2"."School", "T1"."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" * 100 / "T1"."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" FROM "frpm" AS "T1" INNER JOIN "schools" AS "T2" ON "T1"."CDSCode" = "T2"."CDSCode" WHERE "T2"."County" = 'Los Angeles' AND "T2"."GSserved" = 'K-9'
SELECT "GSserved" FROM "schools" WHERE "City" = 'Adelanto' GROUP BY "GSserved" ORDER BY COUNT("GSserved") DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT "County", COUNT("Virtual") FROM "schools" WHERE ("County" = 'San Diego' OR "County" = 'Santa Barbara') AND "Virtual" = 'F' GROUP BY "County" ORDER BY COUNT("Virtual") DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT T1."School Type", T1."School Name", T2."Latitude" FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" ORDER BY T2."Latitude" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT T2."City", T1."Low Grade", T1."School Name" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."State" = 'CA' ORDER BY T2."Latitude" ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 1

SELECT T2."City", COUNT(T2."CDSCode") FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."Magnet" IS TRUE AND T2."GSoffered" = 'K-8' AND T1."NSLP Provision Status" = 'Multiple Provision Types' GROUP BY T2."City"
SELECT T1."Free Meal Count (K-12)" * 100.0 / T1."Enrollment (K-12)", T1."District Code" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."AdmFName1" = 'Alusine'
SELECT "GSoffered" FROM "schools" WHERE ABS("Longitude") = (SELECT MAX(ABS("Longitude")) FROM "schools") ORDER BY "CDSCode" ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT T2."AdmEmail1", T2."School" FROM "satscores" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."cds" = T2."CDSCode" ORDER BY T1."NumGE1500" DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

SELECT T2."AdmEmail1", T2."AdmEmail2" FROM "frpm" AS T1 INNER JOIN "schools" AS T2 ON T1."CDSCode" = T2."CDSCode" WHERE T2."County" = 'San Bernardino' AND T2."City" = 'San Bernardino' AND T2."DOC" = '54' AND TO_CHAR(T2."OpenDate", 'YYYY') BETWEEN '2009' AND '2010' AND T2."SOC" = '62'

WITH RankedAdmFName AS ( SELECT "AdmFName1", COUNT("AdmFName1") AS name_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT("AdmFName1") DESC, "AdmFName1" ASC) as rn FROM "schools" WHERE "AdmFName1" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "AdmFName1" ) SELECT DISTINCT T1."AdmFName1", T1."District" FROM "schools" AS T1 INNER JOIN RankedAdmFName AS T2 ON T1."AdmFName1" = T2."AdmFName1" WHERE T2.rn <= 2 ORDER BY T1."AdmFName1" ASC, T1."District" ASC
